title: AURORA, 33869, Palm Pals Striker Football 5In, Soft Toy, Black & White
features: Introducing Striker Football, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection, is a soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Striker Football is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Striker Football soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Football collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Striker Football measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable black & white coloured mini-football-like soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming black and white colour soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Meet Striker Football, the newest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This super soft and cuddly toy fits in the palm of your hand and is filled with beans. Its black and white plush material makes it look like a mini football. Striker Football is part of the Palm Pals Sports collection, which is just one of the many wonderful collections offered by Palm Pals like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Striker Football soft toy measures 13cm. These gorgeous and irresistibly cute toys make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable black and white coloured mini-football-like soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, Striker Football comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
